data.title: Standard Chartered Bank: Expects average gold price of $4,488/ounce in 2026.
data.description: Standard Chartered Bank predicts that gold prices will reach new highs in 2026, with an average price of $4,488 per ounce in 2026 and an average price of $4,750 per ounce in the fourth quarter of 2026. (Golden10)

data.title: Tom Lee: Strategy's $1.4 billion cash reserve could prevent forced selling during BTC price drops.
data.description: BitMine Chairman Tom Lee analyzed that Strategy's recent accumulation of $1.4 billion in cash reserves is quite remarkable. Despite Strategy's stock price falling by more than 50% in the past six months, this cash reserve will allow the company to continue paying shareholder dividends during the Bitcoin price decline without selling its $61 billion Bitcoin holdings. Lee pointed out that during the last Bitcoin downturn, Strategy's stock traded below its net asset value (NAV), and building this cash reserve is precisely to prepare for that situation. (Decrypt)

data.title: Machi Brother suffered another liquidation of 6,489 ETH and a loss of $720,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Machi Dage has had 6,489 ETH liquidated again, resulting in a loss of $720,000. He currently has only 2,500 ETH in long positions ($7.79 million) remaining. The latest liquidation price is $3,074.62, with a floating loss of $314,000.

data.title: Aave Community Faces Governance Dispute Over Revenue Allocation
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, the Aave community is currently embroiled in a governance dispute centered around whether the integration of CoW Swap is diverting protocol revenue to Aave Labs instead of the Aave DAO. A representative known as 'EzR3aL' posted on the governance forum, claiming that their on-chain analysis indicates transaction fees generated through the new CoW Swap interface are no longer flowing into the DAO treasury but are redirected to a separate address, estimated to be worth approximately $200,000 weekly.

Marc Zeller, head of the Aave Chan Initiative, described the situation as 'extremely concerning,' accusing it of being a 'secret privatization of about 10% of Aave DAO's potential revenue.' The controversy has also extended to the revenue distribution issues related to Aave Vaults, Horizon, and the Aave v4 liquidation engine.

Aave founder Stani Kulechov responded by asserting that Aave Labs has the right to monetize the front-end interface it develops, particularly for features outside the protocol's core functions. He emphasized that the goal is to enhance protocol users and revenue through new functionalities.

data.title: U.S. Supreme Court to Rule on Trump's Tariff Legality
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the U.S. Supreme Court is set to decide on the legality of the comprehensive tariffs introduced by U.S. President Donald Trump in April. This decision could pose a new challenge for the stock market. Since hitting a low in April, the S&P 500 Index has rebounded by 39%, reaching a record high at Thursday's close. If the tariffs are deemed to exceed legal authority, the market may face uncertainty in the future. The court held its last public hearing on Wednesday, with the next session scheduled for January 9 of the following year. Ohsung Kwon, Chief Equity Strategist at Wells Fargo, predicts that if the tariffs are invalidated, the earnings of S&P 500 component companies could grow by 2.4% by 2026.

data.title: Over the past hour, total liquidations across the entire network have reached $113 million, with ETH liquidations amounting to $56.84 million.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, the total liquidation amount across the network in the past hour has expanded to $113 million, including $110 million in long positions and $3.0865 million in short positions. In addition, the liquidation amount of ETH reached $56.84 million and the liquidation amount of BTC reached $30.68 million.

data.title: The "1011 Insider Whale" has increased its 5x leveraged long position in Ethereum, bringing its total position to over 160,000 ETH.
data.description: Following a brief market downturn, the "1011 Insider Whale" appears to have urgently increased its position. Hyperbot data shows that its 5x leveraged Ethereum long position has now increased to approximately 160,403 ETH, with a position value exceeding $500 million. Furthermore, the "1011 Insider Whale's" overall position currently shows a floating loss of $11.12 million, with both its BTC and SOL long positions showing losses.

In addition, $23.09 million in ETH positions were liquidated and $18.39 million in BTC positions were liquidated.

data.title: Binance Wallet: Has blocked suspected malicious ZEROBASE website domains; related malicious contracts have been blacklisted.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced on its X platform that it has discovered a hacker attack on the ZEROBASE platform front-end, resulting in some users being tricked into authorizing malicious contracts. To ensure asset security, Binance Wallet has taken three emergency measures: blocking suspected malicious website domains, blacklisting related malicious contracts, and promising to send alerts to potentially affected users within 30 minutes.

data.title: ZEROBASE Issues Security Alert on Malicious Phishing Contract on BNB Chain
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, the ZEROBASE team released a significant security announcement on December 12, 2025, warning users about a malicious phishing contract on the BNB Chain (BSC). This contract impersonates the official ZEROBASE interface, attempting to deceive users into granting USDT permissions.

The malicious contract is located at address 0x0dd28fd7d343401e46c1af33031b27aed2152396. In response to this threat, ZEROBASE has implemented a malicious authorization detection mechanism. If a user's wallet interacts with this contract, the system will automatically block deposit and withdrawal operations until the user revokes the authorization to the phishing contract.

ZEROBASE advises users to use revoke.cash or other tools to revoke suspicious authorizations and urges the community to remain vigilant. Users are encouraged to carefully verify all contract addresses displayed during wallet interactions and avoid using links from unofficial sources.

data.title: Security Alert Issued After ZEROBASE Front-End Hack
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a security warning has been issued by SlowMist founder Yu Jian following a hack on the ZEROBASE front-end. The attack led to some users inadvertently authorizing USDT to malicious contracts, resulting in asset theft. Users are advised to remain vigilant about their asset security.

data.title: Trump's eldest son followed Aster's partnership with USD1 on social media.
data.description: Donald Trump Jr., the eldest son of Donald Trump, shared and followed the collaboration between Aster and USD1 on the X platform. According to on-chain data, the RAVE/USD1 pair saw over $60 million in on-chain trading volume within three hours of its launch, with market activity continuing to heat up.
